package_metadata.name: w-seg-napari
package_metadata.summary: Segmentation tool for plant tissue plastic sections stained with toluidine blue
package_metadata.description:
# w-seg

[![License MIT](https://img.shields.io/pypi/l/w-seg.svg?color=green)](https://github.com/LMIVainio/w-seg/raw/main/LICENSE)
[![PyPI](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/w-seg.svg?color=green)](https://pypi.org/project/w-seg)
[![Python Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/pyversions/w-seg.svg?color=green)](https://python.org)
[![tests](https://github.com/LMIVainio/w-seg/workflows/tests/badge.svg)](https://github.com/LMIVainio/w-seg/actions)
[![codecov](https://codecov.io/gh/LMIVainio/w-seg/branch/main/graph/badge.svg)](https://codecov.io/gh/LMIVainio/w-seg)
[![napari hub](https://img.shields.io/endpoint?url=https://api.napari-hub.org/shields/w-seg)](https://napari-hub.org/plugins/w-seg)
[![npe2](https://img.shields.io/badge/plugin-npe2-blue?link=https://napari.org/stable/plugins/index.html)](https://napari.org/stable/plugins/index.html)
[![Copier](https://img.shields.io/endpoint?url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/copier-org/copier/master/img/badge/badge-grayscale-inverted-border-purple.json)](https://github.com/copier-org/copier)

A simple CNN based segmentation tool

----------------------------------

This [napari] plugin was generated with [copier] using the [napari-plugin-template] (None).

<!--
Don't miss the full getting started guide to set up your new package:

and review the napari docs for plugin developers:
https://napari.org/stable/plugins/index.html

## Installation

You can install `w-seg` via [pip]:

```bash
pip install w-seg
```

If napari is not already installed, you can install `w-seg` with napari and Qt via:

```bash
pip install "w-seg[all]"
```



## Contributing

Contributions are very welcome. Tests can be run with [tox], please ensure
the coverage at least stays the same before you submit a pull request.

## License

Distributed under the terms of the [MIT] license,
"w-seg" is free and open source software

## Issues

If you encounter any problems, please [file an issue] along with a detailed description.
